comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Planning consensus after a sustained oracle review: port Autoresearch as a sibling domain to Ralph, not as a shared loop framework. Keep the Ralph-shaped split (schema/repo/service/thin adapter/app-owned layer), make autoresearch.jsonl the only canonical persisted history, route benchmark/check/git effects through an injected sandbox-aware AutoresearchExecutionBoundary, and keep adapter state thin. Explicit v1 non-goals: session-history reconstruction fallback and exact fullscreen dashboard hotkey parity. First post-port shared extraction, if still warranted, should be only tiny repo-FS helpers such as optional file reads and atomic write or append helpers.
